scripts.test: corepack pnpm run preflight:db && node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run preflight:db && corepack pnpm --recursive --if-present run typecheck
scripts.db:migrate: corepack pnpm --filter @matchsense/db build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js migrate
scripts.db:check: corepack pnpm --filter @matchsense/db build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js check
